summary: Divya AI Tutor audio playback bug fix and interactive features testing complete. All 10 backend tests pass. Audio endpoint properly supports Range requests (206 Partial Content). /ask and /mind-map endpoints work correctly. Mobile navigation includes Divya Tutor link with mic icon.
critical_code_review_comments: Audio endpoint properly implements Range request handling with 206 Partial Content status
Accept-Ranges: bytes header correctly set for browser audio player compatibility
Content-Range header format is correct: 'bytes start-end/total'
/ask endpoint returns properly formatted Divya/Sher responses
/mind-map endpoint returns valid JSON structure with branches
Join Conversation button has data-testid='join-conversation-btn' for testing
Mobile menu correctly shows 'Divya Tutor' link with Mic icon at line 385-391 in Header.js
Voice preferences correctly implemented: Divya=nova (higher), Sher=echo (mid-range) in divya_routes.py line 139

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Divya Tutor page loads, mobile menu shows Divya Tutor link

seed_data_creation: Created test_audio.mp3 in /tmp/divya_audio/ for Range request testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audio playback fix verified working. Test audio file at /tmp/divya_audio/test_audio.mp3 (45 bytes). Existing podcast files available for testing: podcast_1c706633.mp3 (5MB), podcast_ebd94644.mp3 (6MB). All Divya endpoints are working correctly.
